title: ScannedDataMechWargameOrders
description: scanned_data shape for turn sheet type mech_wargame_orders. Accepts mech movement and attack orders for all mechs in a lance.

mech_orders.description: Ordered list of mech orders for the turn, one entry per mech in the lance.

mech_instance_id.description: The mech instance ID this order applies to.

move_to_sector_instance_id.description: Sector instance ID the mech should move to, or empty to stay in place.

attack_target_mech_instance_id.description: Mech instance ID of the target to attack, or empty for no attack.
